SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-27-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JENNIFER A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, ANGIE $945.75 PRINCIPAL, $52.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $998.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,925.48 FILED BY DIAZ, ANGIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JENNIFER A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT: " GRANTED ".

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DIAZ, ANGIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JENNIFER A. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT ISSUES PERTAINING TO ANY UNPAID RENT FOR THE REMAINING PERIOD OF THE LEASE ARE PREMATURE AND MAY BE ADDRESSED IN A NEW CLAIM FILED AFTER THE LEASE EXPIRES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.
